name: sentimentAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.confidence === 'string'

input.text: This is a great wonderful amazing day
This terrible awful horrible dreadful experience
The cat sat on the mat

_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'linguistics.sentimentAnalysis'. LinguisticsActionPanel sends {artifact:{data:{text}}}; renders r.result.{sentiment,score,positiveWords,negativeWords,confidence}. Deterministic lexicon polarity. score = (pos-neg)/max(pos+neg,1)*100, bucketed >20 positive / <-20 negative / else neutral. FIXED: poisoned non-string text once threw split-of-non-string; now String-coerced so score stays FINITE and sentiment stays in {positive,negative,neutral}. Pinned by server/tests/linguistics-lens-macros.test.js.
